title: Release checkout-api v1.9.0 published
summary: GitHub release evidence records checkout-api v1.9.0 before elevated error reports.
body:
Tag: checkout-api-v1.9.0
Published by: release-bot
This record establishes release timing only.
author: release-bot

title: PR #141 merged: Update checkout retry policy
summary: PR #141 updated the checkout retry policy before v1.9.0; later fixture evidence records a post-release smoke-test failure.
body: Changed retry limits and backoff configuration. The sequence may be worth remembering, but it does not establish that the policy caused the later errors.
author: lee

title: Workflow succeeded: pre-release validation
summary: Pre-release validation succeeded for checkout-api v1.9.0.
body:
Workflow: pre-release validation
Conclusion: success
Ref: checkout-api-v1.9.0-rc1
author: github-actions

title: Workflow failed: post-release smoke test
summary: The post-release smoke test recorded elevated checkout errors after v1.9.0 was published.
body:
Workflow: post-release smoke test
Conclusion: failure
Ref: checkout-api-v1.9.0
The failure does not establish root cause.
author: github-actions
